description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of slippers from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair works great with ethnic wear. This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease. Heel: 1" Upper Ergonomically curved soft synthetic leather footbed for absolute comfort and style Leather straps wrapping around the heel and has a toe separator on the forefoot to hold the foot in place in style Straps heavily beaded and has jute embellishment on the upper for enhanced style Outsole Durable non-slip outsole grooved and textured in the forefoot heel base, and has a stylish heel unit for ultimate grip even on smooth surfaces Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
